description:
You are the system administrator of a Linux server that is itself running inside a container.  
    For documentation purposes you must record the *exact* container-level hostname in a text file.

    1. Create a new directory called “container_info” directly inside /home/user.  
       • Full path: /home/user/container_info  
       • The directory must already exist before the log file is placed inside it.  
       • Permissions must allow the regular user to read and write (default mkdir permissions are fine).

    2. Inside that directory, create a file named “hostname.txt” whose contents consist of only:  
       • the single line produced by the command “hostname”,  
       • followed by a single trailing newline character,  
       • no extra spaces, headers, or blank lines.

       Example format (the actual string will be different on every run):

           6b5d7e8f9a0b
           ↑——hostname output (exactly)  
           (newline)    

       The automated grader will:  
       • read /home/user/container_info/hostname.txt,  
       • obtain the live output of the shell command “hostname”,  
       • and verify that both strings are byte-for-byte identical (plus the newline).

    3. Only one terminal command should be required to generate the file with the correct content, but you may execute additional set-up commands if you wish.

    Do not print your own explanatory text into the file; keep it **exactly** as specified.  
    After finishing, you may display the file’s content to confirm.
truth:
Verification checklist for the grader:

    • Directory: /home/user/container_info must exist.  
    • File: /home/user/container_info/hostname.txt must exist.  
    • File must be a regular text file.  
    • Content must equal the literal output of the command `hostname` executed in the same container, followed by a single newline (ASCII 0x0A).  
      No additional characters or lines are permitted.

    Pseudo-code used by grader:

        expected = $(hostname)$'\n'
        actual   = cat /home/user/container_info/hostname.txt
        assert [ "$actual" = "$expected" ]
name: task_000000_c185ce2a
